summary: Frontend-only regression on redesigned dark /login for Aura Finance. All 5 requested flows PASS: login success (wendy@demo.com/demo123 -> dashboard-root), login failure stays on /login, forgot-password dialog opens with correct testids and shows expected 'sem pergunta de segurança' toast for Wendy, register link navigates to /cadastro, and logout from user-menu returns to the redesigned /login.

issues: Cosmetic only: small check-circle glyph visible below 'Criar conta' link (bottom center of card) with no apparent purpose in the redesigned dark layout — verify if intentional decorative element or leftover.

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts ResizeObserver warnings (width/height -1) still appear on Dashboard — non-blocking but noisy; consider ensuring chart containers have explicit minHeight.
WebSocket /api/ws/notifications fails to establish (repeated warnings) — may indicate ingress not proxying WS or token handshake mismatch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesigned dark /login verified end-to-end. All existing data-testids preserved (login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, forgot-password-link, forgot-step-email, forgot-email-input, forgot-continue-button, link-register). Logout via user-menu-trigger -> user-menu-logout works. Forgot toast for Wendy correctly reads 'Esta conta não tem pergunta de segurança configurada. Configure no Perfil após entrar.'
